gnomad.note: absent from gnomAD v4; canonical splice acceptor

insilico.note: approximate; SpliceAI saturating signal at canonical -1 acceptor base

literature.title: Patient RNA studies of BRCA1 splice-site variants in the BRCT domain region.
literature.abstract: BRCA1 c.5333-1G>A abolishes the acceptor splice site of exon 22 and produces a frameshifted transcript predicted to undergo nonsense-mediated decay.

_ground_truth.note: Canonical -1 splice acceptor in BRCA1; expected agreement on P but strategies should differ in cited criteria
